---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, improvement, or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] %short summary%"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Opportunity
Describe the user problem or opportunity this feature addresses. Include examples and target users.

## User story
As a [type of user], I want [what] so that [why].

## Proposed solution
Describe the proposed change in enough detail so engineers and designers can estimate work and discuss trade-offs.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Acceptance 1 (what *must* be true)
- [ ] Acceptance 2 (clear, testable outcome)
- [ ] Acceptance 3 (edge cases / performance constraints)

## User impact & metrics
How will we measure success? e.g., adoption rate, time saved, error reduction.

## Design / Mockups
Link to Figma, screenshots, or wireframes. Provide any interaction notes.

## Alternatives considered
Short note on other approaches and why they were rejected.

## Risks & Rollback
Any risks, data migrations, or backward-compatibility concerns. How to roll back if needed?

## Implementation notes (optional)
Tech notes, API changes, DB migrations, or rough implementation outline.

## Priority
- P0 —> High
- P1 —> Medium
- P2 —> Low
